Location Description: Born abroad in Honduras, to a family of agriculturists, my family was the first to show me the importance of work hard.
Raised in Chicago, A.G. Bell is where I fell in love with school and all-things-learning. My teachers and coaches there were the best.
ROK Technologies is where I first discovered and evolved into the GIS Developer they knew I wanted to be.
High School was so much better the second time around--coaching and teaching a variety of science courses at The Gunston School was intense and fun.
Survived high school and moved on to earn a B.S. Biology, with a focus on field studies, from Kennesaw State University.
Graduated fulfilled and empowered by the content, skills and research opportunities I tackled as part of my M.S. Environmental Science curriculum at the College of Charleston.
Happy to be working for the City that I love and get to call home.
Work away from home! Enjoy visiting Palm Springs for Esri's DevSummit conference any year I can.
